questions.question: Let A = {1, 2, 3} and B = {a, b, c}. Find the number of elements in the Cartesian product A × B. (5 marks)
Define the relation R on the set A = {1, 2, 3} where (a, b) ∈ R if a is a factor of b. Express this relation in the matrix form. (10 marks)
Let f be a relation from the set A = {1, 2, 3} to the set B = {a, b, c} defined by f = {(1, a), (2, b), (3, c)}. Find the Cartesian product A × B and the image of the relation f. (15 marks)
